memory.summary: I planned to finish the assignment analysis first, but my close friend group is inviting me for lunch right now. I'll join them to prioritize our time together over the reading.

desires: Ensure I don't look like I'm dropping the ball on my team or professor right now, even if it means sacrificing sleep.
Get back to the group and make sure the conversation flows smoothly so nobody feels left out.
Finish this assignment analysis before midnight without having to explain why I missed the deadline again.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for lunch immediately to restore social connection and signal reliability.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) outweighs the academic task here; missing this will create friction with my closest group, which I avoid at all costs. The 'deferred' status of work is acceptable as long as trust isn't damaged.

goals.description: Complete the assignment analysis section before midnight to prevent future deadline explanations.
goals.rationale: I need to finish this eventually to avoid the stress of having to justify missed deadlines, but since I am currently in a high-value social interaction, I will push this back slightly. My deliberate time horizon means I can plan to tackle this after the social event without feeling anxious.

args.content: 아, 죄송! 점심은 다음에 해볼게. 지금 분석 부분 좀 마무리하고 읽어.

trajectory.observation: Messaged cohort_3: '아, 죄송! 점심은 다음에 해볼게. 지금 분석 부분 좀 마무리하고 읽어.'.
